name: Salsa De Aguacate (Avocado Salsa)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the tomatillos and water in a saucepan. Bring to a boil.
2. Reduce heat to medium and simmer for 10-12 minutes until the tomatillos are soft.
3. Drain the mixture and discard the water.
4. Add the chopped avocados, habanero chile, garlic, and onion to the blender or food processor.
5. Blend until smooth, adding a little water if needed to achieve a creamy consistency.
6. Serve with tostadas or on a bed of greens for a salad.
Yield: 2 cups
Heat Scale: Hot
